sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64727" key="makrofluarh/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μακρο-φλῠᾱρήτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n64727.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tedious prater</tr_>, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.134</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Lucill.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
